tasks.roguelike:compile: cd demos/roguelike && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npx gulp build
tasks.currency:compile: cd demos/currency && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npx vite build --base=/currency/
tasks.resize:compile: cd demos/resize && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && NODE_ENV=production make all
tasks.state-sync:compile: cd demos/state-sync && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && make all
tasks.valorant-blog:compile: cd demos/valorant && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && make all
tasks.clickmart:compile: cd demos/clickmart && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && make all
tasks.discord-queue:compile: cd demos/discord-queue && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && make all
tasks.onclick-notes:compile: cd demos/notes && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && make all
tasks.reasonable:compile: cd demos/reasonable/client && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npx vite-ssg build --base=/reasonable/
tasks.assemble: rm -rf public && mkdir -p public/h8ball public/roguelike public/currency public/resize public/state-sync public/valorant-blog public/clickmart public/discord-queue public/onclick-notes public/dvd public/reasonable public/codepen/challenge-pocket-js public/codepen/challenge-react public/codepen/challenge-vue-js public/codepen/css-3d-toggle-button public/codepen/svg-digital-clock public/codepen/nested-jquery-dropdown public/codepen/ios-chat-bubbles public/codepen/messenger public/codepen/vue-pagination public/codepen/emoji public/codepen/vue-queue-1 public/codepen/vue-queue-2 public/codepen/vue-queue-3 && cp index.html public/index.html && cp -r demos/h8ball/* public/h8ball/ && cp -r demos/roguelike/dist/* public/roguelike/ && cp -r demos/currency/dist/* public/currency/ && cp -r demos/resize/build/* public/resize/ && cp -r demos/state-sync/build/* public/state-sync/ && cp -r demos/valorant/build/* public/valorant-blog/ && cp -r demos/clickmart/build/* public/clickmart/ && cp -r demos/discord-queue/public/* public/discord-queue/ && cp -r demos/notes/public/* public/onclick-notes/ && cp -r demos/orphans/dvd/* public/dvd/ && cp -r demos/reasonable/client/dist/* public/reasonable/ && cp -r demos/codepen/challenge-pocket-js/* public/codepen/challenge-pocket-js/ && cp -r demos/codepen/challenge-react/* public/codepen/challenge-react/ && cp -r demos/codepen/challenge-vue-js/* public/codepen/challenge-vue-js/ && cp -r demos/codepen/css-3d-toggle-button/dist/* public/codepen/css-3d-toggle-button/ && cp -r demos/codepen/svg-digital-clock/* public/codepen/svg-digital-clock/ && cp -r demos/codepen/nested-jquery-dropdown/dist/* public/codepen/nested-jquery-dropdown/ && cp -r demos/codepen/ios-chat-bubbles/dist/* public/codepen/ios-chat-bubbles/ && cp -r demos/codepen/messenger/dist/* public/codepen/messenger/ && cp -r demos/codepen/vue-pagination/dist/* public/codepen/vue-pagination/ && cp -r demos/codepen/emoji/dist/* public/codepen/emoji/ && cp -r demos/codepen/vue-queue-1/dist/* public/codepen/vue-queue-1/ && cp -r demos/codepen/vue-queue-2/dist/* public/codepen/vue-queue-2/ && cp -r demos/codepen/vue-queue-3/dist/* public/codepen/vue-queue-3/
tasks.build: deno task roguelike:compile && deno task currency:compile && deno task resize:compile && deno task state-sync:compile && deno task valorant-blog:compile && deno task clickmart:compile && deno task discord-queue:compile && deno task onclick-notes:compile && deno task reasonable:compile && deno task codepen:compile && deno task assemble
tasks.build:docker: docker run --rm -v "$PWD:/app" -w /app/demos node:10-buster sh -c 'cd roguelike && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npx gulp build' && docker run --rm -v "$PWD:/app" -w /app/demos node:16-buster sh -c 'git config --global url."https://github.com/".insteadOf "ssh://git@github.com/" && cd currency && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npx vite build --base=/currency/ && cd ../resize && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && NODE_ENV=production make all && cd ../state-sync && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && make all && cd ../valorant && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && make all && cd ../clickmart && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && make all && cd ../notes && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && make all' && docker run --rm -v "$PWD:/app" -w /app/demos node:14-buster sh -c 'cd discord-queue && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && make all' && docker run --rm -v "$PWD:/app" -w /app/demos node:20-slim sh -c 'cd reasonable/client && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npx vite-ssg build --base=/reasonable/' && deno task assemble
